key.name: expansion-trigger
key.summary: What causes the pill to expand

key.name: transient-duration-ms
key.summary: Duration of transient flashes in milliseconds

key.name: media-show-cover-art
key.summary: Show MPRIS cover art on compact view

key.name: media-preferred-player
key.summary: Bus name of preferred MPRIS player; empty = most recently played

key.name: notification-excluded-apps
key.summary: Desktop file ids whose notifications do not surface in the pill

key.name: notification-coalesce-threshold
key.summary: Number of notifications before collapsing to "N new"

key.name: volume-replace-native-osd
key.summary: Suppress the built-in GNOME OSD while the pill flashes

key.name: power-low-threshold
key.summary: Battery percentage below which a warning flashes

key.name: idle-content
key.summary: What the pill shows in idle state

key.name: respect-system-theme
key.summary: Use Adwaita tokens that track light/dark preference
